mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_SCRIN_BTN_MNG_Dao_selectBtnInfo */ SELECT intn_sys_div_cd, A.btn_seq, A.btn_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu WHERE btn_athr_list LIKE '%' || TO_CHAR(A.btn_athr_vu) || '%' /* TO_CHAR(A.btn_athr_vu) IN ( usr_dfn_nm1, usr_dfn_nm2, usr_dfn_nm3, usr_dfn_nm4, usr_dfn_nm5, usr_dfn_nm6, usr_dfn_nm7, usr_dfn_nm8, usr_dfn_nm9 ) */ ) AS menu_cnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_menu WHERE btn_athr_list LIKE '%' || TO_CHAR(A.btn_athr_vu) || '%' /* TO_CHAR(A.btn_athr_vu) IN ( usr_dfn_nm1, usr_dfn_nm2, usr_dfn_nm3, usr_dfn_nm4, usr_dfn_nm5, usr_dfn_nm6, usr_dfn_nm7, usr_dfn_nm8, usr_dfn_nm9 ) */ ) AS usr_cnt FROM tm_ecs_scrin_btn_mng A WHERE A.intn_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd} AND A.btn_seq = #{btnSeq}
mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_SCRIN_BTN_MNG_Dao_insertScrinBtn */ INSERT INTO TM_ECS_SCRIN_BTN_MNG ( intn_sys_div_cd, btn_seq, btn_nm, btn_athr_vu, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id ) VALUES ( #{intnSysDivCd}, #{btnSeq}, #{btnNm}, #{btnAthrVu}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
